title: AgentLogEvent
description: One structured log line emitted by a TDD-workflow role agent. The workflow is a relay of isolated-memory agents; each agent emits what it is doing so a centralized log (.tdd/agent-log.jsonl) reconstructs the whole run. Persisted as JSON Lines: one object per line, fields in order timestamp, level, role, event, message, metadata.

level.description: debug = reasoning considerations; info = outputs/decisions; warn = smells/ambiguity surfaced; error = gate refusal/substrate failure.

model.description: The model the role's turn ran with (resolved from tdd-config.json). Present on the per-turn dispatch (phase.start) events; omitted where not applicable.

effort.description: The --effort level the role's turn ran with (low|medium|high|xhigh|max), or 'default' when no flag was passed. Present on the per-turn dispatch (phase.start) events.

event.description: Event name from the CLOSED vocabulary (scripts/tdd/agent-log-events.ts). An off-vocabulary event is rejected at emit (the message template + required slots live there). Keep this enum in sync with that module (guarded by a test).

metadata.description: Structured payload. feature_id is the top-level attribute (primary scope key); phase / cycle_id and any event-specific keys (artifact path, gate name, conformance violations, ...) follow.

feature_id.description: The feature this event scopes to (e.g. F1-initial-domain).

phase.description: Workflow phase, e.g. discovery, architectural-review, test-list-construction, implementation.

cycle_id.description: RED/GREEN/REFACTOR cycle id, when the event is cycle-scoped (navigator/driver).
